email_subject: Application for Sales Support Expert at VIVALDIS
email_body:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to apply for the Sales Support Expert position at VIVALDIS, as advertised via Vivaldis Sint-Niklaas. With a background in digital marketing and strong administrative skills, I am confident I can contribute to your team.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage client websites, handle order-related communications, and ensure accurate data entry in CMS tools. I am proficient in Microsoft Office and CRM platforms, and I have experience coordinating with account managers to meet deadlines. My organizational skills and attention to detail allow me to handle multiple tasks efficiently.

I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. I am eager to bring my communication and problem-solving abilities to VIVALDIS and support your account managers in building strong customer relationships.

I look forward to discussing how my skills align with your needs. Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to apply for the Sales Support Expert position at VIVALDIS. With a strong foundation in digital marketing, administrative coordination, and customer communication, I am well-prepared to support your account managers and ensure smooth sales operations.

Currently, as a Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I manage multiple client websites, handle order processing, and maintain accurate records in content management systems. I regularly communicate with clients via email and phone to resolve issues and ensure timely delivery. This experience has honed my organizational skills, attention to detail, and ability to work under pressure in a fast-paced environment.

I am proficient in Microsoft Office and CRM tools, and I quickly adapt to new software like Odoo. My background includes coordinating with account managers to prioritize tasks and meet deadlines. I am fluent in English and Turkish, with Dutch at A2 level and actively improving, which allows me to communicate effectively with diverse clients.

I am drawn to VIVALDIS because of its family-oriented culture and focus on employee development. I am eager to contribute to your team by building strong customer relationships, managing sales administration accurately, and providing proactive support.

Thank you for considering my application. I look forward to the opportunity to discuss how I can add value to VIVALDIS.

Sincerely,

Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
Proficient in Microsoft Office and CRM tools, with experience managing client communications and order processing.
Strong organizational and multitasking skills, handling multiple client accounts and deadlines simultaneously.
Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving.
Experience coordinating with account managers and providing administrative support in a fast-paced environment.
Quick to learn new software and systems, with a technical background in web and digital tools.
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

Profile
Junior digital marketer with strong administrative and communication skills, experienced in client coordination, order processing, and CRM management. At Episto, I manage client accounts, handle order-related communications, and ensure accurate data entry. Proficient in Microsoft Office and quick to learn new systems like Odoo. Fluent in English and Turkish; Dutch at A2 level and actively improving. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp.

Core Skills
- Administrative & CRM: order processing, client communication, data entry, Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, Outlook), CRM tools
- Communication: client-facing support, email and phone correspondence, relationship building
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (A2, in progress)
- Organizational: multitasking, deadline management, attention to detail, stress resistance
- Digital & Technical: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, WordPress, Canva

Experience

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Manage client websites and handle order-related communications, ensuring timely and accurate processing
- Coordinate with account managers to prioritize tasks and meet client deadlines
- Maintain accurate records in content management systems and track performance metrics
- Write and publish content, manage client correspondence via email and phone

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

Projects

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site, managing full project lifecycle and client communication
- Implemented structured data and technical optimizations to improve search visibility

Education
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

References
Available on request.
